text:
There once was a wise owl who liked books. Every night she would curl up with a good one. But one night she thought Ow ow ow. Something strange.

She flew out into Oaks avenue.

There were cats. They didnowl know owl.

They chased her. They didn't let her alone.

Then she fluttered fast. She flew high.

Oh no.

She saw a hawk.

Her scream.

He saw that owl.

Goooowl !

But she didn't fly.

She snuggled.

They took her home.



They love moose.


That's me.




There. Why?

Because there's nothing better.

I just love books.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
